channel.title: Magic Coffee on Barista At Home
channel.description: Recent content in Magic Coffee on Barista At Home

item.title: Magic Coffee Recipe: Melbourne's Secret-Menu Double Ristretto Drink
item.description: How to make a magic coffee — Melbourne's signature 5 oz drink: 2 ristretto shots topped with steamed milk in a small glass. Includes recipe, magic vs flat white vs piccolo comparison, and why baristas love it.
